item.title: Kubernetes OS Upgrades
item.author: Author
item.description: When the Node is Offline Note Kubernetes wait 5 minutes that is configured in Controller Manager. If the Node is still offline after 5 minutes, Kubernetes will create the PODs to other Nodes. After then the Node comes to online, the Node is empty. Configure Eviction Time 1 kube-controller-manager --pod-eviction-timeout=5m0s cordon Node cordon The cordon makes the Node is not possible to schedule any POD.
